choices.text: DDS-based, decentralized, real-time capable, multi-robot native, embedded support, SROS2 security. ROS 1 EOL May 2025. Use Humble (2022 LTS) or Jazzy (2024 LTS) for production.
Topics (pub/sub async), services (RPC sync), actions (long-running with feedback), parameters (config). Pick by use: stream → topic, query → service, navigate → action.
Sensor data: BEST_EFFORT (UDP-like, high rate, lossy OK). Commands: RELIABLE (every msg matters). Subscriber QoS must match publisher; mismatch = silent message drops.
Launch files (Python): generate_launch_description() returns LaunchDescription with Node + remappings + parameters. Compose smaller files (bringup pattern). Composable nodes for zero-copy IPC.
Gazebo simulation: physics + sensor plugins; same ros2_control code runs sim + real. Iterate fast. Bridge sim2real gap via domain randomization + hardware fine-tune. Final test always on real robot.
